reference: There can be haziness due to radiation-induced lung fibrosis. If the nodule has remained stable in size and there is no evidence of disease anywhere else, I would suggest that the nodule size be followed with a computed tomography scan in three months' time.
text: There can be haziness due to radiation-induced lung fibrosis if the nodule has remained stable in size and there is no evidence of disease anywhere else. I would suggest that the nodule size be followed with a computed tomography scan in 3 months' time.
